item.title: Init wizard + config generation + writer
item.intent: Guide a non-technical user from blueprint selection to a valid, landmine-free config in one interactive session. Generated config must pass all 14 validation rules.
item.description: CORE USER FLOW: This is the forging ceremony — the moment where a blueprint becomes a personalized agent. The guided wizard is the primary path for the Privacy Migrant persona who chose ClawHQ specifically because they don't want to hand-write 13,500 tokens of config. Air-gapped mode support ensures the wizard works without calling home. Acceptance: wizard completes without errors on happy path; generated config passes all 14 landmine rules; atomic writer never produces partial files; air-gap mode skips cloud-dependent steps gracefully.
steps: Build interactive setup wizard with guided prompts
Implement config generation enforcing all 14 landmine rules
Support air-gapped mode (skip cloud-dependent steps gracefully)
acceptanceCriteria: Wizard completes without errors on happy path
Generated config passes all 14 landmine validation rules
Atomic writer never produces partial config files
Air-gap mode skips cloud-dependent steps gracefully
